item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ- nodeм¶”к°Җ(мҲҳлҸҷ)
item.description:
Redis Node м¶”к°Җн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°

  • Redis nodeмқҳ memory мӮ¬мҡ©лҘ мқҙ лҶ’м•„ л¶„мӮ°мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•  л•Ң nodeлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳм—¬ hashslotмқ„ л¶„мӮ°н•ңлӢӨ.
  • kubernetes 1.20v л¶Җн„°лҠ” Memory мӮ¬мҡ©лҘ мқ„ metricмңјлЎң м¶”к°Җн•  мҲҳ мһҲм–ҙ Memory мӮ¬мҡ©лҘ м—җ л”°лҘё autoscaleмқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӮҳ к·ё м•„лһҳ лІ„м „м—җм„ңлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ мҲҳлҸҷмңјлЎң м¶”к°Җн•ҙм•јн•Ё
  • NHN cloud м ңкіө kubernetesлҠ” 1.17v лҘј м ңкіөн•Ё

Node м¶”к°Җ кіјм •

мІҳмқҢ мғҒнғң

$ kubectl get all


NAME                                                  READY   STATUS      RESTARTS   AGE
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0                      1/1     Running     0          31m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1                      1/1     Running     0          31m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2                      1/1     Running     0          31m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3                      1/1     Running     0          31m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4                      1/1     Running     0          31m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5                      1/1     Running     0          31m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create-6wp5g   0/1     Completed   0          31m

NAME                                          TYPE        CLUSTER-IP       EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)              AGE
service/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster            ClusterIP   10.254.123.224   <none>        6379/TCP             31m
service/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless   ClusterIP   None             <none>        6379/TCP,16379/TCP   31m
service/kubernetes                            ClusterIP   10.254.0.1       <none>        443/TCP              18d

NAME                                          READY   AGE
statefulset.apps/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster   6/6     31m

NAME                                                  COMPLETIONS   DURATION   AGE
job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create   1/1           28s        31m

node м¶”к°Җ м»Өл§Ёл“ң мҲҳн–ү

$ export REDIS_PASSWORD=$(kubectl get secret --namespace default kimdubi-test-redis-cluster -o jsonpath="{.data.redis-password}" | base64 --decode)

$ helm upgrade --timeout 600s kimdubi-test --set "password=${REDIS_PASSWORD},cluster.nodes=7,cluster.update.addNodes=true,cluster.update.currentNumberOfNodes=6,global.storageClass=kimdubi-test"  ./redis-cluster
  • Job/batch нҺём—җм„ң ліё кІғмІҳлҹј helm upgrade мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳл©ҙ hook лҸҷмһ‘мңјлЎң upgrade Jobмқ„ нҳём¶ңн•Ё
  • cluster.update.currentNumberOfNodes=6 : нҳ„мһ¬ 6к°ң NodeмңјлЎң мқҙлӨ„м§„ cluster лҘј
    cluster.nodes=7 : мқјкіұк°ңмқҳ nodeлЎң
    cluster.update.addNodes=true : node м¶”к°Җн•ҳкІ лӢӨлҠ” м»Өл§Ёл“ң
  • global.storageClass=kimdubi-test : PVCлҘј н• лӢ№н•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” StorageClassлҠ” л§ЁмІҳмқҢ мғқм„ұн–ҲлҚҳ kimdubi-test storageclass мңјлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳкІ лӢӨлҠ” мқҳлҜё

м»Өл§Ёл“ң мҲҳн–ү м§Ғнӣ„

$ $ kubectl get all
NAME                                                  READY   STATUS        RESTARTS   AGE
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0                      1/1     Running       0          33m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1                      1/1     Running       0          33m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2                      1/1     Running       0          33m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3                      1/1     Running       0          33m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4                      1/1     Running       0          33m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5                      0/1     Terminating   0          33m
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-6                      1/1     Running       0          25s
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create-79d77   0/1     Completed     0          24s
pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update-mtr76   1/1     Running       0          2s
pod/testnet                                           1/1     Running       0          11d

NAME                                          TYPE        CLUSTER-IP       EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)              AGE
service/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster            ClusterIP   10.254.123.224   <none>        6379/TCP             33m
service/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless   ClusterIP   None             <none>        6379/TCP,16379/TCP   33m
service/kubernetes                            ClusterIP   10.254.0.1       <none>        443/TCP              18d

NAME                                          READY   AGE
statefulset.apps/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster   6/7     25s

NAME                                                  COMPLETIONS   DURATION   AGE
job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create   1/1           21s        24s
job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update   0/1           2s         2s
  • pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-6 мӢ к·ң Pod к°Җ м¶”к°Җ мғқм„ұлҗЁ
  • StatefulSetм—җ ліҖкІҪмӮ¬н•ӯмқҙ мғқкІјкі  updateStrategyк°Җ RollingUpdate мқҙкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ лӢӨлҘё Podл“ӨлҸ„ н•ҳлӮҳм”© мһ¬мғқм„ұлҗЁ
  • мһ¬мғқм„ұмқҖ index 6 -> 0 мҲңм„ңлЎң м§„н–үлҗҳкі  мһ¬кё°лҸҷ нӣ„м—җлҸ„ Master - Slave кҙҖкі„лҠ” мң м§ҖлҗЁ

redis cluster info

  • node м¶”к°Җ м „ мІҳмқҢ мғҒнғң
127.0.0.1:6379> cluster nodes
2d518c1ad99e6b2dbedcf8f0027ac5ebc8507021 10.100.79.103:6379@16379 slave d4053b7b22c11550cc504bb6e89b615a24c0d9c1 0 1615684830021 9 connected
d2f4db52d7cbf4e4dba981ad190d8dae6195dd52 10.100.14.116:6379@16379 myself,master - 0 1615684827000 8 connected 5461-10922

d4053b7b22c11550cc504bb6e89b615a24c0d9c1 10.100.71.85:6379@16379 master - 0 1615684828000 9 connected 0-5460

9243566b8b590661198ced938bb7f1748c985d39 10.100.14.117:6379@16379 master - 0 1615684829016 7 connected 10923-16383
  • node 1к°ң м¶”к°Җ нӣ„ мғҒнғң
127.0.0.1:6379> cluster info
cluster_state:ok
cluster_slots_assigned:16384
cluster_slots_ok:16384
cluster_slots_pfail:0
cluster_slots_fail:0
cluster_known_nodes:6

127.0.0.1:6379> cluster nodes
2d518c1ad99e6b2dbedcf8f0027ac5ebc8507021 10.100.79.103:6379@16379 slave d4053b7b22c11550cc504bb6e89b615a24c0d9c1 0 1615684830021 9 connected

d9195d121b334ec98959fbe30faed25e9a8414a8 10.100.79.102:6379@16379 master - 0 1615684829000 0 connected
55ff96c5dc4c106d703bb833dbe9284ee2a6d7de 10.100.14.118:6379@16379 slave 9243566b8b590661198ced938bb7f1748c985d39 0 1615684827000 7 connected
9243566b8b590661198ced938bb7f1748c985d39 10.100.14.117:6379@16379 master - 0 1615684829016 7 connected 10923-16383

=> d9195d121b334ec98959fbe30faed25e9a8414a8 10.100.79.102:6379@16379 master - 0 1615684829000 0 connected nodeк°Җ мғҲлЎң master лЎң м¶”к°ҖлҗҗмңјлӮҳ slotмқ„ л¶„л°° л°ӣм§Җ лӘ»н•ң мғҒнҷ©мһ„

  • hashslot reblancing
$ redis-cli --cluster info kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-6.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless:6379

=> мғҲлЎңмҡҙ NodeлҘј rebalancing н•ҳм—¬ redis cluster мқҳ Master nodeлЎң м¶”к°ҖмӢңмјңмӨҢ.
мқҙл•Ң statefulsetмқҳ нҠ№м„ұмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҙ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ Nodeмқҳ IPк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј domain мЈјмҶҢлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

Node н•ҳлӮҳ лҚ” м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ ?

  • node н•ҳлӮҳ лҚ” м¶”к°Җ ( node 7 -> 8 )
$ helm upgrade --timeout 600s kimdubi-test --set "password=${REDIS_PASSWORD},cluster.nodes=8,cluster.update.addNodes=true,cluster.update.currentNumberOfNodes=7,global.storageClass=kimdubi-test"  ./redis-cluster

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Job/batch
item.description:
Job?

Jobк°ңл…җ

  • мқјнҡҢм„ұмңјлЎң мӢӨн–үлҗҳкі  лӮҳм„ң мў…лЈҢлҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” м„ұкІ©мқҳ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мӢӨн–үн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” controller
  • helm chart м—җм„ңлҠ” мЈјлЎң hook мқҳ к°ңл…җмңјлЎң helmмқҳ life cycle мӨ‘ (helm install, helm upgrade л“ұ) нҠ№м • лӢЁкі„м—җм„ң мӮ¬м „м—җ м •мқҳн•ҙл‘” Jobмқҙ мҲҳн–үлҗҳлҸ„лЎқ trigger мІҳлҹј лҸҷмһ‘н•ҳкІҢ л§Һмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё
  • linuxмқҳ crontab мІҳлҹј м •н•ҙм§„ мҠӨмјҖмҘҙ л§ҲлӢӨ Jobмқҙ мҲҳн–үлҗҳкІҢ н•ҳлҠ” cronjob лҸ„ мһҲмқҢ

Job мӮ¬мҡ©нҳ„нҷ©

$ kubectl get job

NAME                                                  COMPLETIONS   DURATION   AGE
job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create   1/1           37s        4m27s
job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update   1/1           24s        3m50s
  • kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create JobмқҖ helm installлЎң redis clusterлҘј кө¬м„ұн•  л•Ң мң„ Jobмқҙ install нӣ„м—җ мҲҳн–үлҗҳм–ҙ redis clusterлҘј кө¬м„ұн•ҳлҠ” мҡ©лҸ„лЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳкі  мһҲмқҢ
  • kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update JobмқҖ helm upgrade м»Өл§Ёл“ңлЎң redis clusterмқҳ nodeлҘј м¶”к°Җн•  л•Ң лҸҷмһ‘н•ҳлҠ” Job

Job templateмқ„ мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create

$ kubectl get -o yaml job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: post-install,post-upgrade
  creationTimestamp: "2021-02-21T07:33:55Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
    helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
  name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create
  namespace: default
  resourceVersion: "25079"
  selfLink: /apis/batch/v1/namespaces/default/jobs/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create
  uid: 91756ad1-444b-4593-90d1-8703a170cbc8
spec:
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 600
  backoffLimit: 6
  completions: 1
  parallelism: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      controller-uid: 91756ad1-444b-4593-90d1-8703a170cbc8
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
        app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
        controller-uid: 91756ad1-444b-4593-90d1-8703a170cbc8
        helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
        job-name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-create
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
                  app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
              namespaces:
              - default
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
            weight: 1
      containers:
      - args:
        - |
          # Backwards compatibility change
          if ! [[ -f /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf ]]; then
              cp /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf
          fi
          /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/entrypoint.sh /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/run.sh
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        env:
        - name: REDIS_TLS_ENABLED
          value: "no"
        - name: REDIS_PORT
          value: "6379"
        - name: REDIS_NODES
          value: 'kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
            kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
            kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
            kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless '

              key: redis-password

        - name: REDIS_CLUSTER_REPLICAS

.metatdata.annotations

  • м—¬м§Җк»Ҹ ліё лӢӨлҘё мҳӨлёҢм қнҠёл“ӨкіјлҠ” лӢӨлҘҙкІҢ helm.sh/hook: post-install,post-upgrade мқҙлқјлҠ” м„Өм •мқҙ мһҲмқҢ
  • HookмқҖ мғқм„ұн•ң chartлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ update мҲҳн–ү л“ұ chart мқҳ cycle мӨ‘м—җ trigger мІҳлҹј м–ҙл–Ө actionмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•  мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ н•ҙмЈјлҠ” кё°лҠҘ
  • мң„мІҳлҹј annotation мңјлЎң helm hook мһ„мқ„ лӘ…мӢңн•ҳкі  post-install,post-upgrade мІҳлҹј м–ҙлҠҗ мӢңм җм—җ мқҙ Jobмқҙ мҲҳн–үлҗ  кІғмқём§ҖлҘј м •мқҳ н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • мқҙ JobмқҖ helm chart м„Өм№ҳ нӣ„, helm chart upgrade нӣ„ мҲҳн–үлҗҳлҠ” Jobмһ„

.spec.completion && .spec.parallelism

  • parallelism мқҖ н•ҙлӢ№ Jobмқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳлҠ” Podк°Җ лі‘л ¬лЎң мғқм„ұлҗҳм–ҙ мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” к°ң мҲҳ, parallelistm 3мқҙл©ҙ PodлҠ” 3к°ңк°Җ л– м„ң лҸҷмһ‘н•Ё
  • completion мқҖ Jobмқҙ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҷ„лЈҢн•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” Podмқҳ к°ң мҲҳ
  • parallelism 5 & completion 2 мқј л•Ң PodлҘј лҸҷмӢңм—җ 5к°ңлҘј лқ„мҡё мҲҳ мһҲмңјлӮҳ Pod 2к°ңл§Ң мһ‘м—… м„ұкіөн•ҳл©ҙ лҗҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ Pod 2к°ңл§Ң лңЁкІҢлҗЁ
  • parallelistm 2 & completion 5 мқј л•Ң PodлҠ” лҸҷмӢңм—җ 2к°ңлҘј лқ„мҡё мҲҳ мһҲкі  мһ‘м—…мқҙ мҷ„лЈҢлҗҳл Өл©ҙ completion 5лҘј мұ„мӣҢм•ј н•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ Pod 2лҢҖ, 2лҢҖ, 1лҢҖ м”© л– м„ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ мІҳлҰ¬н•ҳкІҢлҗЁ

.spec.template.spec

  • Pod мғқм„ұ templateкіј лҸҷмқјн•ҳм§Җл§Ң .spec.template.spec.containers.env л¶Җл¶„м—җ м¶”к°ҖлҗҳлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©мқҙ мһҲмқҢ

.spec.template.spec.containers.env

        - name: REDIS_CLUSTER_CREATOR
          value: "yes"
        - name: REDIS_CLUSTER_REPLICAS
          value: "1"
  • м „мІҙм ҒмңјлЎң Pod мғқм„ұкө¬л¬ёкіј л№„мҠ·н•ҳлӮҳ Jobм—җм„ң мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” PodмқҖ мң„ нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳк°Җ м¶”к°Җлҗҳм—ҲмқҢ
  • мқҙ нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳлҠ” container мғқм„ұ мӢң мҲҳн–үлҗҳлҠ” мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠём—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј кө¬м„ұн•ҳлҠ” keyлЎңмҚЁ лҸҷмһ‘н•ҳкІҢ лҗЁ
      containers:
      - args:
        - |
          # Backwards compatibility change
          if ! [[ -f /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf ]]; then
              cp /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf
          fi
          /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/entrypoint.sh /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/run.sh
  • Pod лӮҙ redis container к°Җ мғқм„ұлҗҳкі  /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/run.sh мқҙ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј мҲҳн–үн•  л•Ң REDIS_CLUSTER_CREATOR : yes мқё к°’мқ„ к°Җм§Җкі  мғқм„ұлҗң containerмҷҖ м•„лӢҢ containerк°Җ л¶„кё°лҗҳм–ҙ лӢӨлҘё м—ӯн• мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•Ё
  • мқҙ Jobмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ мғқм„ұлҗң PodлҠ” helm install нӣ„м—җ hook нҳём¶ң лҗҳм–ҙ REDIS_CLUSTER_CREATOR к°’мқ„ к°Җм§Җкі  м•һм„ң мғқм„ұлҗң Podл“Өмқ„ clusterкө¬м„ұн•ҳлҠ” м—ӯн• мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳкі  мў…лЈҢлҗЁ

job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update

$ kubectl get -o yaml job.batch/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: post-upgrade
  creationTimestamp: "2021-03-06T08:32:53Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
    helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.4.0
  name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update
  namespace: default
  resourceVersion: "4073462"
  selfLink: /apis/batch/v1/namespaces/default/jobs/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update
  uid: 1f2e3f6f-ba6e-4150-88e8-e5c692dbc801
spec:
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 600
  backoffLimit: 6
  completions: 1
  parallelism: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      controller-uid: 1f2e3f6f-ba6e-4150-88e8-e5c692dbc801
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
        app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
        controller-uid: 1f2e3f6f-ba6e-4150-88e8-e5c692dbc801
        helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.4.0
        job-name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-cluster-update
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
                  app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
              namespaces:
              - default
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
            weight: 1
      containers:
      - args:
        - |
          . /opt/bitnami/scripts/libnet.sh
          . /opt/bitnami/scripts/libos.sh
          # Backwards compatibility change
          if ! [[ -f /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf ]]; then
              cp /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf
          fi
          previousNodeIp=""
          firstNodeIp=$(wait_for_dns_lookup kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless 120 5)
          for node in $(seq $((1+6)) 7); do
            new_node_index="$(($node - 1))"
            new_node_ip=$(wait_for_dns_lookup kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-"$new_node_index".kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless 120 5)
            while [[ $(redis-cli -h "$new_node_ip" -p "$REDIS_PORT" ping) != 'PONG' ]]; do
              echo "Node $new_node_ip not ready, waiting for all the nodes to be ready..."
              sleep 5
            done
            slave=()
            if (( $REDIS_CLUSTER_REPLICAS >= 1 )) && (( new_node_index % (( $REDIS_CLUSTER_REPLICAS + 1 )) )); then
              slave+=("--cluster-slave")
              [ -z previousNodeIp ] && previousNodeIp=$firstNodeIp
              if [ -z "$REDISCLI_AUTH" ]; then
                masterID=$(redis-cli -c -h $previousNodeIp cluster myid)
              else
                masterID=$(redis-cli -c -h $previousNodeIp -a $REDISCLI_AUTH cluster myid)
              fi
              slave+=("--cluster-master-id $masterID")
              echo "Adding Node $new_node_index ${new_node_ip} as slave of ${masterID}"
            else
              previousNodeIp=$new_node_ip
              echo "Adding Node $new_node_index ${new_node_ip} as master"
            fi
            while ! redis-cli --cluster add-node "${new_node_ip}:${REDIS_PORT}" "${firstNodeIp}:${REDIS_PORT}" ${slave[@]}; do
              echo "Add-node ${new_node_index} ${new_node_ip} failed, retrying"
              sleep 5
              firstNodeIp=$(wait_for_dns_lookup kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless 120 5)
            done
          done
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        env:
        - name: REDIS_PORT
          value: "6379"
        - name: REDIS_CLUSTER_REPLICAS
          value: "1"
        - name: REDISCLI_AUTH
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: redis-password
              name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
        image: docker.io/bitnami/redis-cluster:6.0.12-debian-10-r0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: trigger
        resources: {}
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 1001
      serviceAccount: default
      serviceAccountName: default
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  completionTime: "2021-03-06T08:33:17Z"
  conditions:
  - lastProbeTime: "2021-03-06T08:33:17Z"
    lastTransitionTime: "2021-03-06T08:33:17Z"
    status: "True"
    type: Complete
  startTime: "2021-03-06T08:32:53Z"
  succeeded: 1

.metatdata.annotations

  • helm.sh/hook: post-upgrade , upgrade мҲҳн–ү мӢң мғқм„ұлҗҳлҠ” JobмңјлЎң м•„лһҳ м»Өл§Ёл“ң мҲҳн–ү мӢң лҸҷмһ‘н•Ё
helm upgrade --timeout 600s kimdubi-test --set "password=${REDIS_PASSWORD},cluster.nodes=7,cluster.update.addNodes=true,cluster.update.currentNumberOfNodes=6,global.storageClass=kimdubi-test"  bitnami/redis-cluster

.spec.template.spec.container.args

  • мғҲлЎңмҡҙ Pod лӮҙ redis container мғқм„ұн•ҳл©ҙм„ң redis clusterм—җ мӢ к·ң nodeлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳкё° мң„н•ң мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј м „лӢ¬н•Ё
  • мһҗм„ён•ң лӮҙмҡ©мқҖ autoscale нҺём—җм„ң лӢӨлЈё

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Configmap
item.description:
configmap?

configmap к°ңл…җ

  • Pod лӮҙ ContainerлЎң лқ„мҡҙ application ( Redis, apache …) м—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” м„Өм • к°’мқ„ configmap мқҙлқјлҠ” лҸ…лҰҪм Ғмқё мҳӨлёҢм қнҠёлЎң л¶„лҰ¬н•Ё
  • DEVмҡ©, TESTмҡ©, PRODмҡ©мңјлЎң configmapмқ„ л”°лЎң кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳм—¬ н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ лҸҷмқјн•ң ContainerлЎң м—¬лҹ¬ нҷҳкІҪм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • мҲҳм • л°°нҸ¬к°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ°м—җлҸ„ Container мқјмқјмқҙ м ‘мҶҚн•ҙм„ң мҲҳм •н•ҳлҠ” кІҢ м•„лӢҲлқј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” Configmapмқ„ мҲҳм •н•ҳм—¬ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

configmap мӮ¬мҡ©нҳ„нҷ©

$ kubectl get configmap
NAME                                 DATA   AGE
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-default   1      6d19h
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts   2      6d19h
  • kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-default configmapмқҖ redis.conf мқҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ лӢҙкі  мһҲмқҢ
  • kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts configmapмқҖ redis health check мҡ©мңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” script мқҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ лӢҙкі  мһҲмқҢ

configmap templateмқ„ мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-default

$ kubectl get configmap -o yaml kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-default

apiVersion: v1
data:
  redis-default.conf:
  "# Redis configuration file example.\n#\n# Note that in order
    to read the configuration file, Redis must be\n# started with the file path as
    first argument:\n#\n# .
    .
    .
    .

.data

  • configmapм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  м„Өм •л“Өмқ„ м •мқҳн•ҳлҠ” л¶Җл¶„, мң„м—җм„  redis.conf мқҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ лӢҙкі мһҲмқҢ

kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts

$ kubectl get configmap kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts -o yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  ping_liveness_local.sh: |-
    export REDISCLI_AUTH=$REDIS_PASSWORD
    response=$(
      timeout -s 9 $1 \
      redis-cli \
        -h localhost \
        -p $REDIS_PORT \
        ping
    )
    if [ "$response" != "PONG" ] && [ "$response" != "LOADING Redis is loading the dataset in memory" ]; then
      echo "$response"
      exit 1
    fi
  ping_readiness_local.sh: |-
    export REDISCLI_AUTH=$REDIS_PASSWORD
    response=$(
      timeout -s 9 $1 \
      redis-cli \
        -h localhost \
        -p $REDIS_PORT \
        ping
    )
    if [ "$response" != "PONG" ]; then
      echo "$response"
      exit 1
    fi
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: kimdubi-test
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: default
  creationTimestamp: "2021-02-21T07:33:55Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
    helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
  name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts
  namespace: default
  resourceVersion: "24609"
  selfLink: /api/v1/namespaces/default/configmaps/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts
  uid: 89b2319a-fd57-475f-9671-deb80023f6b8

.data

  • redis health checkлҘј мң„н•ң ping_liveness_local.sh
  • redis мӮ¬мҡ©к°ҖлҠҘн•ң мғҒнғңмқём§Җ check лҘј мң„н•ң ping_readiness_local.sh
  • мң„ мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҘј Podм—җ м ңкіөн•ҳкі  мһҲмқҢ
    livenessProbe:
      exec:
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - /scripts/ping_liveness_local.sh 5
      failureThreshold: 5
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 5

    readinessProbe:
      exec:
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - /scripts/ping_readiness_local.sh 1
      failureThreshold: 5
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 1

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Service
item.description:
Service?

Service к°ңл…җ

  • PodлҠ” deployment, replicaset, statefulset к°ҷмқҖ controllerм—җ мқҳн•ҙ кҙҖлҰ¬лҗҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мғҲлЎң мғқкІЁлӮҳкұ°лӮҳ м—Ҷм–ҙм§Җкё°лҸ„ н•ҳкі  н•ң Nodeм—җл§Ң л– мһҲлҠ” кІҢ м•„лӢҲлқј м—¬лҹ¬ NodeлҘј мҳ®кІЁлӢӨлӢҗ мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • PodлҠ” мқҙл Үл“Ҝ лҸҷм ҒмңјлЎң ліҖн•ҳм—¬ кі м •лҗң endpointлЎңмқҳ нҳём¶ңмқҙ м–ҙл ӨмҡҙлҚ° (Podмқҳ IP,hostnameмқҙ ліҖн•ҳлӢҲк№Ң ) мқҙлҹ¬н•ң мқҙмҠҲлҘј н•ҙкІ°н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң мҳӨлёҢм қнҠёк°Җ Serviceмһ„
  • ClientлҠ” нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° м•Ҳм—җм„ң Pod IPк°Җ л°”лҖҢлҚҳ м—Ҷм–ҙм§Җкұҙ мғҲлЎң мғқкё°кұҙ мӢ кІҪм“ё н•„мҡ” м—Ҷмқҙ Serviceл§Ң л°”лқјліҙл©ҙ кі м •лҗң endpointлЎң м ‘к·јмқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•Ё
  • ServiceлҠ” нҒ¬кІҢ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ л„Өк°Җм§Җ TypeмңјлЎң лӮҳлүЁ
    • ClusterIp : kubernets cluster лӮҙл¶Җм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” service. мҷёл¶Җм—җм„  м ‘к·јн•  мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ
    • LoadBalancer : нҶ нҒҙ,aws,gcp л“ұ нҚјлё”лҰӯ нҒҙлқјмҡ°л“ң м„ңл№„мҠӨлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©к°ҖлҠҘн•ң typeмңјлЎң loadbalancerмқҳ IPлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мҷёл¶Җм—җм„ң м ‘к·јк°ҖлҠҘн•Ё
    • NodePort : kubernetes clusterмқҳ к°Ғ л…ёл“ңмқҳ м§Җм •лҗң portлҘј serviceм—җ н• лӢ№н•Ё. nodeмқҳ portлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мҷёл¶Җм—җм„ңлҸ„ м ‘к·јк°ҖлҠҘн•Ё
    • ExternalName : kubernetes cluster лӮҙл¶Җм—җм„ң мҷёл¶ҖлЎң м ‘к·јн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° мӮ¬мҡ©, ServiceлҘј ExternalName мңјлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳм—¬ CNAMEмқ„ нғҖкі  мҷёл¶ҖлЎң м ‘к·јн•Ё
  • мқҙ кёҖм—җм„ң лӢӨлЈЁлҠ” redis-cluster м—җм„ңлҠ” ClusterIP typeмқҳ serviceлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі  мһҲмқҢ ( DBлҠ” лӮҙл¶ҖнҶөмӢ л§Ң н•ҳл©ҙ лҗҳлӢҲк№Ң)

Service мӮ¬мҡ©нҳ„нҷ©

$ kubectl get service
NAME                                  TYPE        CLUSTER-IP    EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)              AGE
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster            ClusterIP   10.254.8.60   <none>        6379/TCP             6d
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless   ClusterIP   None          <none>        6379/TCP,16379/TCP   6d
kubernetes                            ClusterIP   10.254.0.1    <none>        443/TCP              6d1h
  • kubernetes cluster лӮҙл¶Җм—җм„ң Pod к°„ м—°кІ°мқ„ мң„н•ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” ClusterIP typeмқҳ kimdubi-test-redis-cluster лқјлҠ” мқҙлҰ„мқҳ service
  • ClusterIP typeмқҙм§Җл§Ң IPк°Җ м„Өм •лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless лқјлҠ” мқҙлҰ„мқҳ service, headless serviceлқјкі  н•Ё
  • л‘җк°ңмқҳ serviceк°Җ мғқм„ұлҗҳм—Ҳм§Җл§Ң мӢӨм ңлЎңлҠ” kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless м„ңл№„мҠӨк°Җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗЁ

headless serviceлһҖ?

  • kimdubi-test-redis-cluster к°ҷмқҖ ліҙнҶөмқҳ serviceлҠ” л°ӣмқҖ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ л§Өн•‘лҗң Podл“Өм—җкІҢ loadbalancing нҳ•нғңлЎң лҝҢл ӨмЈјлҠ”лҚ° мқҙлҠ” stateless н•ң web server мІҳлҹј, м–ҙл–Ө web serverлЎң мҡ”мІӯмқҙ к°ҖлҸ„ лҸҷмқјн•ң кІ°кіјлҘј лӮҙлҠ” кө¬мЎ°м—җм„ң мқҳлҜёк°Җ мһҲмқҢВ 
  • DBмІҳлҹј Master / Slave к°ҷмқҖ stateful н•ң кө¬м„ұм—җм„ңлҠ” loadbalancing нҳ•нғңлЎң лҝҢл ӨмЈјлҠ” кІҢ м•„лӢҲлқј Master мқём§Җ Slaveмқём§Җ нҢҢм•…н•ҳм—¬ нҠ№м •н•ң Podм—җ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ лҝҢл ӨмӨҳм•јн•Ё
  • мқҙмІҳлҹј loadbalancingмқҙ н•„мҡ”м—Ҷкі  client м—җм„ң лӘЁл“  Podм—җ м ‘к·јн•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” кө¬м„ұм—җм„ңлҠ” headless serviceлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©° м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ нҠ№м§•мқҙ мһҲмқҢ
    • headless serviceлҠ” IP лҢҖмӢ  dns лҘј к°Җм§җ
    • headless serviceмқҳ dnsм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ nslookupмқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳл©ҙ binding лҗң лӘЁл“  Podл“Өмқҳ IPлҘј return н•Ё
    • ClientлҠ” return л°ӣмқҖ лӘЁл“  Podмқҳ IPлҘј нҶөн•ҙ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” Pod м—җ м§Ғм ‘ м ‘к·јн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
# nslookup kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
Server:		10.254.0.10
Address:	10.254.0.10#53

Name:	kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless.default.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.100.71.3
Name:	kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless.default.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.100.14.7
Name:	kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless.default.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.100.79.12
Name:	kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless.default.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.100.14.8
Name:	kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless.default.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.100.79.11
Name:	kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless.default.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.100.71.4

=> kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless serviceм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ nslookup мҲҳн–ү мқҙ serviceм—җ binding лҗң лӘЁл“  Podмқҳ IPлҘј return л°ӣмқҢ

Service мғқм„ұ templateмқ„ мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

kimdubi-test-redis-cluster

$ kubectl get service kimdubi-test-redis-cluster -o yaml

kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: kimdubi-test
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: default
  creationTimestamp: "2021-02-21T07:33:55Z"

    helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
  name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
  namespace: default
  resourceVersion: "24613"
  selfLink: /api/v1/namespaces/default/services/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
  uid: c7a73d74-a532-4689-8d9e-45287df887b3

  - name: tcp-redis
    port: 6379
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: tcp-redis
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
  sessionAffinity: None

.spec.clusterIP

  • clusterIP typeмңјлЎң мғқм„ұлҗң serviceлҘј м§Җм •н•ң IPлЎң мғқм„ұлҗҳлҸ„лЎқ м„Өм •
  • мқҙ serviceлҠ” 10.254.8.60 IPлҘј н• лӢ№л°ӣкІҢлҗЁ

.spec.ports[]

  • н•ҙлӢ№ м„ңл№„мҠӨмқҳ label selector м—җ л§Өм№ҳлҗҳлҠ” Podмқҳ нҠ№м • Port (targetPort) лҘј serviceмқҳ 6379 portм—җ л§Өн•‘мӢңнӮҙ

.spec.selector

  • н•ҙлӢ№ serviceк°Җ м—°кІ°н•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” лҢҖмғҒ Podмқҳ label мЎ°кұҙ
  • kimdubi-test , redis-cluster мқҳ labelмқҙ лӢ¬лҰ° PodлҠ” мқҙ serviceлҘј нҶөн•ҙ м ‘к·јн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

.spec.sessionAffinity

  • нҠ№м • нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёк°Җ нҠ№м • Podм—җ л¶ҷм–ҙм•јн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •

.spec.type

  • serviceмқҳ typeмңјлЎң defaultлҠ” ClusterIP

kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless

$ kubectl get service kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless -o yaml

.spec.clusterIP

  • мң„м—җм„ң ліё kimdubi-test-redis-cluster serviceмҷҖлҠ” лӢӨлҘҙкІҢ clusterIP к°’мқҙ None мңјлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳм—¬ headless serviceлҘј мғқм„ұн•Ё

.spec.ports[]

  • н•ҙлӢ№ м„ңл№„мҠӨмқҳ label selector м—җ л§Өм№ҳлҗҳлҠ” Podмқҳ нҠ№м • Port (targetPort) лҘј serviceмқҳ 6379 portм—җ л§Өн•‘мӢңнӮҙ

.spec.selector

  • н•ҙлӢ№ serviceк°Җ м—°кІ°н•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” лҢҖмғҒ Podмқҳ label мЎ°кұҙ
  • kimdubi-test , redis-cluster мқҳ labelмқҙ лӢ¬лҰ° PodлҠ” мқҙ serviceлҘј нҶөн•ҙ м ‘к·јн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Statefulset
item.description:
StatefulSet ?

StatefulSet к°ңл…җ

  • StatefulSetмқҖ Podмқ„ scale up&down н•ҳм—¬ мғҲлЎң л°°нҸ¬ н•  л•Ң к°Ғ Podмқҳ кё°мЎҙ Spec(hostname,Ipл“ұ) мқ„ мң м§Җн•ҳм—¬ мғқм„ұн•Ё (stateful)
  • stateless н•ң deployment, replicaset кіјлҠ” лӢӨлҘём җмһ„
  • Pod лі„лЎң к°Ғк°Ғмқҳ PVCлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ Pod мғқм„ұ мҲңм„ңк°Җ мӨ‘мҡ”н•  л•Ң (Master / Slave кө¬м„ұмқҙ н•„мҡ”н• л–„) statefulset мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ Orderingмқ„ ліҙмһҘн•ҳкі  кө¬л¶„м§Җмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • мң„ кө¬м„ұмқ„ replicaSet , delpoymentлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н–ҲлӢӨл©ҙ pod-0 , pod-1 мқҙ к°ҷмқҖ PVC,PVлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ Pod кі мң мқҳ stateк°Җ мӮ¬лқјм§Җкі  , мһ¬кё°лҸҷ лҗ  л•Ңл§ҲлӢӨ IP,hostnameмқҙ лӢ¬лқјм ё headless ServiceлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ

StatefulSet мӮ¬мҡ© нҳ„нҷ©

$ kubectl get statefulset
NAME                         READY   AGE
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster   6/6     2d4h
  • statefulset н•ҳлӮҳлЎң Pod 6лҢҖлҘј кҙҖлҰ¬н•Ё, Podмқҙ downлҗҳм–ҙлҸ„ statefulsetм—җ мқҳн•ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң restart лҗЁ
  • Pod,pvc мғқм„ұ кө¬л¬ёмқҖ statefulset м—җм„ң м •мқҳлҗЁ

StatefulSet templateмқ„ мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

$ kubectl get statefulset kimdubi-test-redis-cluster -o yaml

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: kimdubi-test
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: default
  creationTimestamp: "2021-02-21T07:33:55Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
    helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
  name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
  namespace: default
  resourceVersion: "358350"
  selfLink: /apis/apps/v1/namespaces/default/statefulsets/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
  uid: b348894a-e930-4dc2-ba10-c8566eeec0b9
spec:
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 6
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
      app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
  serviceName: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        checksum/scripts: 13c84ab100b949b2a69989dbcfa1079e3d930ee56d79744da9abc6d691709923
        checksum/secret: 3fb9c96414bd6f5e1a0841de974fcb260231a9c12bebb2c49af0f02b651e47cf
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
        app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
        helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
                  app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
              namespaces:
              - default
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
            weight: 1
      containers:
      - args:
        - |
          # Backwards compatibility change
          if ! [[ -f /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf ]]; then
              echo COPYING FILE
              cp  /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf
          fi
          /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/entrypoint.sh /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/run.sh
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        env:
        - name: REDIS_NODES
          value: 'kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
            kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
            kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
            kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless '
        - name: REDISCLI_AUTH
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: redis-password
              name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
        - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: redis-password
              name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
        - name: REDIS_AOF_ENABLED
          value: "yes"
        - name: REDIS_TLS_ENABLED
          value: "no"
        - name: REDIS_PORT
          value: "6379"
        image: docker.io/bitnami/redis-cluster:6.0.10-debian-10-r5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - /scripts/ping_liveness_local.sh 5
          failureThreshold: 5
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: tcp-redis
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 16379
          name: tcp-redis-bus
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - /scripts/ping_readiness_local.sh 1
          failureThreshold: 5
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 100Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 50m
            memory: 50Mi
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /scripts
          name: scripts
        - mountPath: /bitnami/redis/data
          name: redis-data
        - mountPath: /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf
          name: default-config
          subPath: redis-default.conf
        - mountPath: /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/
          name: redis-tmp-conf
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      enableServiceLinks: false
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 1001
      serviceAccount: default
      serviceAccountName: default
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 493
          name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts
        name: scripts
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-default
        name: default-config
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: redis-tmp-conf
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: redis-data
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 2Gi
      storageClassName: kimdubi-test
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending
status:
  collisionCount: 0
  currentReplicas: 6
  currentRevision: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-86585bd988
  observedGeneration: 1
  readyReplicas: 6
  replicas: 6
  updateRevision: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-86585bd988
  updatedReplicas: 6

.spec.replicas

  • statefulset м—җм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬н•  лҸҷмқјн•ң мҠӨнҺҷмқҳ PodлҘј 6лҢҖл§ҢнҒј мғқм„ұн•ҳкІ лӢӨлҠ” м„Өм •
  • мғқм„ұн•  Podмқҳ мғҒм„ё м„Өм •мқҖ .spec.template.specм—җ м •мқҳ лҗҳм–ҙмһҲмқҢ

.spec.selector.matchLabels

  • statefulset м—җм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬н•  PodлҘј кө¬л¶„м§“лҠ” мЎ°кұҙ
  • Podмқҳ labelкіј .spec.selector.matchLabelsк°Җ лҸҷмқјн•ңм§Җ мІҙнҒ¬лҘј нҶөн•ҙ кҙҖлҰ¬н•  PodлҘј кө¬л¶„н•Ё

.spec.serviceName

  • statefulset мңјлЎң мғқм„ұлҗң Pod л“Өмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  Service
  • statefulset м—җм„  Podм—җ м§Ғм ‘ accessн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” DNSлҘј н• лӢ№н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ headless serviceлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё
  • кҙҖл Ё лӮҙмҡ©мқҖ serviceнҺём—җм„ң..

.spec.template.metadata.labels

  • мғқм„ұн•  Podмқҳ label мқ„ м„Өм •н•ҳлҠ” л¶Җл¶„, .spec.selector.matchLabelsмқҳ labelкіј мқјм№ҳн•ҙм•јн•Ё

.spec.updateStrategy.type

  • statefulset мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ л°°нҸ¬н•  л•Ң Podмқҙ л°°нҸ¬лҗҳлҠ” л°©мӢқмқ„ м„Өм •
  • RollingUpdate : Ordering лҗң Pod л“Өмқ„ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү Podл¶Җн„° мҲңм„ңлҢҖлЎң мһ¬мғқм„ұн•ҳм—¬ л°°нҸ¬н•Ё
  • onDelete : Podмқ„ мҲҳлҸҷмңјлЎң мӮӯм ң н–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң мғҲлЎңмҡҙ м„Өм •мқҙ л°ҳмҳҒлҗң Podк°Җ мғқм„ұлҗЁ

.spec.volumeClaimTemplates

  • statefulset м—җ мқҳн•ҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳкі  кҙҖлҰ¬лҗҳлҠ” Podм—җ н•ҳлӮҳм”© binding н•ҙмӨ„ PVC м •мқҳ л¶Җл¶„
  • м •мқҳн•ң PVCлҘј .spec.template.spec.containers.volumeMounts лҘј нҶөн•ҙ containerмқҳ /bitnami/redis/data л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ bindingн•ҳкі  мһҲмқҢ

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Volume
item.description:
Volume ?

volume к°ңл…җ

  • м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ лӮҙ нҢҢмқјмқҖ stateless н•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ лҚ°мқҙн„° ліҙмЎҙмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ° Volumeмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•јн•Ё
  • kubernetesм—җм„ң VolumeмқҖ Pod м—җ мў…мҶҚлҗҳм–ҙ к°ҷмқҖ Podм—җ мһҲлҠ” containerл“ӨмқҖ volumeмқ„ кіөмң н•Ё
  • Volume typeм—җлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ м—¬лҹ¬ л°©мӢқмқҙ мһҲмқҢ
    • emptyDir : Pod мҷҖ н•Ёк»ҳ мғқм„ұлҗҳкі  Podк°Җ мў…лЈҢлҗ  л•Ң к°ҷмқҙ мӮӯм ңлҗҳлҠ” мһ„мӢңліјлҘЁ
    • hostPath : Podк°Җ мҶҚн•ң nodeмқҳ лЎңм»¬ л””мҠӨнҒ¬мқҳ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј Podм—җ л§ҲмҡҙнҠё н•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё, лҸҷмқј nodeм—җм„ң Podмқҙ мһ¬мғқм„ұ лҗҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°м—” лҚ°мқҙн„° ліҙмЎҙмқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӮҳ nodeк°Җ лӢ¬лқјм§Җл©ҙ лҚ°мқҙн„° ліҙмЎҙмқҙ л¶Ҳк°ҖлҠҘн•Ё
    • nfs : кё°мЎҙ NFS (л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬нҢҢмқјмӢңмҠӨн…ң) мІҳлҹј м—¬лҹ¬ Podм—җм„ң лҸҷмӢңм—җ л§ҲмҡҙнҠё н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” ліјлҘЁ

PV / PV к°ңл…җ

  • PV (Persistent Volume) : Podм—җ мў…мҶҚм Ғмқё volumeкіјлҠ” лӢ¬лҰ¬ PVлҠ” к·ё мһҗмІҙлЎң kubernetes clusterмқҳ resourceлЎң кҙҖлҰ¬лҗЁ. Podмқҳ мҲҳлӘ…мЈјкё°мҷҖлҠ” кҙҖкі„ м—Ҷмқҙ лҸ…лҰҪм Ғмқҙкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ Podк°Җ мһ¬мӢңмһ‘лҗҳкұ°лӮҳ, лӢӨлҘё nodeлЎң migration лҗҳм–ҙлҸ„ мғҒкҙҖм—Ҷмқҙ PVлҠ” мң м§ҖлҗЁ ToastCloud лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ PVлҠ” н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ ToastCloud Block StorageмҷҖ м—°кІ°лҗЁ
  • PVC (Persistent Volume Claim) : н•„мҡ”н•ң ліјлҘЁмқҳ мҡ”кө¬мӮ¬н•ӯм—җ лҢҖн•ң м •мқҳм„ңлЎң мҡ©лҹү, мқҪкё°/м“°кё° лӘЁл“ң л“ұмқ„ м •мқҳн•ҳл©ҙ мЎ°кұҙмқ„ л§ҢмЎұн•ҳлҠ” PVлҘј к°Җм ёлӢӨ binding н•Ё
    • static provisioning : мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ м§Ғм ‘ PVлҘј лҜёлҰ¬ мӨҖл№„н•ҙм•ј н•ҳл©° PVC лҘј нҶөн•ҙ PVлҘј мҡ”мІӯн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң мЎ°кұҙм—җ л§һлҠ” PV к°Җ м—Ҷмқ„ л•җ мӮ¬мҡ© л¶Ҳк°Җ
    • dynamic provisioning : storageClass м—җ м •мқҳлҗң мҶҚм„ұмқ„ м°ёмЎ°н•ҳм—¬ PVCмқҳ мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мһҲмқ„ л•Ң лҸҷм ҒмңјлЎң PVлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳм—¬ PVCм—җ binding н•Ё

PV /PVC мғқлӘ… мЈјкё°

  • PV, PVC м—җлҠ” мң„мҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ Pod лҸ…лҰӯм ‘мқё мғқлӘ…мЈјкё°к°Җ мһҲмқҢ
  • Provisioning : PVлҘј л§Ңл“ңлҠ” лӢЁкі„ , static / dynamic л°©мӢқмңјлЎң лӮҳлүЁ
  • Binding : Provisioning лӢЁкі„лҘј кұ°міҗ мғқм„ұлҗң PVлҘј PVCмҷҖ 1:1 лЎң м—°кІ°н•ҳлҠ” лӢЁкі„, PVCм—җм„ң мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” мҠӨнҶ лҰ¬м§Җмқҳ мҡ©лҹүкіј мҠӨнҺҷмқ„ лӘ…мӢңн•ҙм„ң мҡ”мІӯн•ҳл©ҙ м•Ңл§һмқҖ PVк°Җ н• лӢ№лҗҳл©° м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ мҡ”мІӯмқҖ pending мғҒнғңлЎң л№ м§җ.
  • Using : PVCк°Җ Podм—җ н• лӢ№лҗҳкі , PodлҠ” PVCлҘј VolumeмңјлЎң мқёмӢқн•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” мғҒнғң, н• лӢ№лҗң PVCлҠ” мһ„мқҳлЎң мӮӯм ңлҗ  мҲҳ м—Ҷкі  ліҙнҳёлҗЁ ( Storage Object in Use Protection )
  • Reclaiming : мӮ¬мҡ©мқҙ лҒқлӮң PVCк°Җ мӮӯм ңлҗҳм–ҙ PVлҘј мҙҲкё°нҷ”н•ҳлҠ” лӢЁкі„

PV / PVC мӮ¬мҡ© нҳ„нҷ©

$ kubectl get pv
NAME                                       CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   RECLAIM POLICY   STATUS   CLAIM                                             STORAGECLASS   REASON   AGE
pvc-10412da7-46bb-43e0-b791-a810774b7c87   2Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1   kimdubi-test            2d4h
pvc-3b7c88ff-6e56-428a-885f-58301e05478f   2Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0   kimdubi-test            2d4h
pvc-6a5aa328-8ca2-4450-a308-1c07cc7aab60   2Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2   kimdubi-test            2d4h
pvc-92e41155-d644-4799-b974-2a35c19ada8b   2Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4   kimdubi-test            2d4h
pvc-b198c891-2d0c-474e-9113-2ad0f198a336   2Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3   kimdubi-test            2d4h
pvc-b2fe7621-e748-4cc7-aa4c-2efee2fc0cd8   2Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5   kimdubi-test            2d4h

$ kubectl get pvc
NAME                                      STATUS   VOLUME                                     CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   AGE
redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0   Bound    pvc-3b7c88ff-6e56-428a-885f-58301e05478f   2Gi        RWO            kimdubi-test   2d4h
redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1   Bound    pvc-10412da7-46bb-43e0-b791-a810774b7c87   2Gi        RWO            kimdubi-test   2d4h
redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2   Bound    pvc-6a5aa328-8ca2-4450-a308-1c07cc7aab60   2Gi        RWO            kimdubi-test   2d4h
redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3   Bound    pvc-b198c891-2d0c-474e-9113-2ad0f198a336   2Gi        RWO            kimdubi-test   2d4h
redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4   Bound    pvc-92e41155-d644-4799-b974-2a35c19ada8b   2Gi        RWO            kimdubi-test   2d4h
redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5   Bound    pvc-b2fe7621-e748-4cc7-aa4c-2efee2fc0cd8   2Gi        RWO            kimdubi-test   2d4h

  • PVмҷҖ л§Өн•‘лҗҳлҠ” block storage

PV / PVC templateмқ„ мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

Persistent Volume

$ kubectl get persistentvolume/pvc-10412da7-46bb-43e0-b791-a810774b7c87 -o yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/createdby: cinder-dynamic-provisioner
    pv.kubernetes.io/bound-by-controller: "yes"
    pv.kubernetes.io/provisioned-by: kubernetes.io/cinder
  creationTimestamp: "2021-02-21T07:33:56Z"
  finalizers:
  - kubernetes.io/pv-protection
  labels:
    failure-domain.beta.kubernetes.io/region: RegionOne
    failure-domain.beta.kubernetes.io/zone: kr-pub-b
  name: pvc-10412da7-46bb-43e0-b791-a810774b7c87
  resourceVersion: "24691"
  selfLink: /api/v1/persistentvolumes/pvc-10412da7-46bb-43e0-b791-a810774b7c87
  uid: df950b89-f229-4d2f-9b77-0f1f47e327aa
spec:
  accessModes:
  - ReadWriteOnce
  capacity:
    storage: 2Gi
  cinder:
    volumeID: 9b284d26-a868-4f0a-86d2-4c3916ccf791
  claimRef:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    name: redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1
    namespace: default
    resourceVersion: "24628"
    uid: 10412da7-46bb-43e0-b791-a810774b7c87
  nodeAffinity:
    required:
      nodeSelectorTerms:
      - matchExpressions:
        - key: failure-domain.beta.kubernetes.io/region
          operator: In
          values:
          - RegionOne
        - key: failure-domain.beta.kubernetes.io/zone
          operator: In
          values:
          - kr-pub-b
  persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Delete
  storageClassName: kimdubi-test
  volumeMode: Filesystem
status:
  phase: Bound

.spec.accessModes

  • ReadWriteOnce : node н•ҳлӮҳл§Ң ліјлҘЁм—җ read / write н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ mountн•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •
  • ReadOnlyMany : м—¬лҹ¬ nodeм—җм„ң read н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ mount н•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •
  • ReadWriteMany : м—¬лҹ¬ л…ёл“ңм—җм„ң read / write н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ mountн•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •

.spec.claimRef

  • н•ҙлӢ№ PV к°Җ binding лҗң PVC м •ліҙ, мң„ PVлҠ” redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1 PVCм—җ л¬¶м—¬мһҲмқҢ

.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy

  • PVк°Җ н•ҙм ңлҗҳм—Ҳмқ„ л•Ңмқҳ мҙҲкё°нҷ” мҳөм…ҳ м„Өм •
  • retain : PVлҘј к·ёлҢҖлЎң ліҙмЎҙн•Ё, мқҙ PVлҘј мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл Өл©ҙ м§Ғм ‘ мҲҳлҸҷмңјлЎң PVлҘј мӮӯм ңн•ҳм—¬ мҙҲкё°нҷ”н•ҙм•јн•Ё
  • Recycle : PVмқҳ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј мӮӯм ңн•ҳкі  лӢӨмӢң мғҲлЎңмҡҙ PVC м—җ binding лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ н•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •
  • Delete : PVлҘј мӮӯм ңн•ҳкі  м—°кІ°лҗң мҷёл¶Җмқҳ мҠӨнҶ лҰ¬м§Җ ліјлҘЁлҸ„ мӮӯм ңн•Ё (default м„Өм •)

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Pod
item.description:
Pod ?

Pod к°ңл…җ

  • PodмқҖ kubernetes нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° лӮҙ мөңмҶҢ л°°нҸ¬лӢЁмң„
  • н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ PodлҠ” н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ nodeм—җ мҶҚн•ҳкі  node лӢЁмң„лЎң мҳ®кІЁлӢӨлӢҗ мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • Pod м—җлҠ” м—¬лҹ¬к°ңмқҳ containerк°Җ нҸ¬н•Ёлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲкі  Pod лӮҙ containerл“ӨмқҖ storageмҷҖ networkлҘј кіөмң н•ҳл©° лӮҙл¶ҖнҶөмӢ мқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•Ё

Pod мӮ¬мҡ© нҳ„нҷ©

$ kubectl get pod
NAME                           READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0   1/1     Running   0          23h
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1   1/1     Running   0          2d1h
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2   1/1     Running   1          23h
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3   1/1     Running   1          2d1h
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4   1/1     Running   0          23h
kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5   1/1     Running   0          23h
  • ліёл¬ём—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” helm chart м—җм„ңлҠ” Redis Podмқ„ 6лҢҖ мғқм„ұн•Ё
  • 3лҢҖлҠ” Master , 3лҢҖлҠ” Slave лЎң лҸҷмһ‘ мӨ‘
  • PodмқҖ statefulset м—җ мқҳн•ҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳкі  кҙҖлҰ¬лҗҳл©° Podмқҳ container imageлӮҳ к°ңмҲҳ, м„Өм •л“ұмқ„ ліҖкІҪн•ҳкі  мӢ¶лӢӨл©ҙ helm chart лӮҙ statefulsetкіј values.yamlмқ„ мҲҳм •н•ҙм•јн•Ё

Pod templateмқ„ мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

$ kubectl get pod/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0 -o yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  annotations:
    checksum/scripts: 13c84ab100b949b2a69989dbcfa1079e3d930ee56d79744da9abc6d691709923
    checksum/secret: 3fb9c96414bd6f5e1a0841de974fcb260231a9c12bebb2c49af0f02b651e47cf
  creationTimestamp: "2021-02-22T09:21:50Z"
  generateName: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
    controller-revision-hash: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-86585bd988
    helm.sh/chart: redis-cluster-4.3.0
    statefulset.kubernetes.io/pod-name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0
  name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0
  namespace: default
  ownerReferences:
  - apiVersion: apps/v1
    blockOwnerDeletion: true
    controller: true
    kind: StatefulSet
    name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
    uid: b348894a-e930-4dc2-ba10-c8566eeec0b9
  resourceVersion: "358338"
  selfLink: /api/v1/namespaces/default/pods/kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0
  uid: ccfca1d7-e997-4375-acbd-aa44b1428c35
spec:
  affinity:
    podAntiAffinity:
      preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
      - podAffinityTerm:
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/instance: kimdubi-test
              app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
          namespaces:
          - default
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
        weight: 1
  containers:
  - args:
    - |
      # Backwards compatibility change
      if ! [[ -f /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf ]]; then
          echo COPYING FILE
          cp  /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf
      fi
      /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/entrypoint.sh /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/run.sh
    command:
    - /bin/bash
    - -c
    env:
    - name: REDIS_NODES
      value: 'kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-1.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
        kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-2.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-3.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
        kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-4.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-5.kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless '
    - name: REDISCLI_AUTH
      valueFrom:
        secretKeyRef:
          key: redis-password
          name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
    - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
      valueFrom:
        secretKeyRef:
          key: redis-password
          name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
    - name: REDIS_AOF_ENABLED
      value: "yes"
    - name: REDIS_TLS_ENABLED
      value: "no"
    - name: REDIS_PORT
      value: "6379"
    image: docker.io/bitnami/redis-cluster:6.0.10-debian-10-r5
    imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    livenessProbe:
      exec:
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - /scripts/ping_liveness_local.sh 5
      failureThreshold: 5
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 5
    name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster
    ports:
    - containerPort: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
    - containerPort: 16379
      name: tcp-redis-bus
      protocol: TCP
    readinessProbe:
      exec:
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - /scripts/ping_readiness_local.sh 1
      failureThreshold: 5
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 1
    resources:
      limits:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 100Mi
      requests:
        cpu: 50m
        memory: 50Mi
    securityContext:
      runAsUser: 1001
    terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
    terminationMessagePolicy: File
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /scripts
      name: scripts
    - mountPath: /bitnami/redis/data
      name: redis-data
    - mountPath: /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis-default.conf
      name: default-config
      subPath: redis-default.conf
    - mountPath: /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/
      name: redis-tmp-conf
    - mountPath: /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount
      name: default-token-5zmdw
      readOnly: true
  dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
  enableServiceLinks: false
  hostname: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0
  nodeName: kimdubi-test-default-w-46niimovcith-node-2
  restartPolicy: Always
  schedulerName: default-scheduler
  securityContext:
    fsGroup: 1001
  serviceAccount: default
  serviceAccountName: default
  subdomain: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-headless
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  tolerations:
  - effect: NoExecute
    key: node.kubernetes.io/not-ready
    operator: Exists
    tolerationSeconds: 300
  - effect: NoExecute
    key: node.kubernetes.io/unreachable
    operator: Exists
    tolerationSeconds: 300
  volumes:
  - name: redis-data
    persistentVolumeClaim:
      claimName: redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0
  - configMap:
      defaultMode: 493
      name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-scripts
    name: scripts
  - configMap:
      defaultMode: 420
      name: kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-default
    name: default-config
  - emptyDir: {}
    name: redis-tmp-conf
  - name: default-token-5zmdw
    secret:
      defaultMode: 420
      secretName: default-token-5zmdw
status:
  conditions:

.labels

  • key-value нҳ•нғңлЎң controllerк°Җ мһҗмӢ мқҙ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” PodлҘј кө¬л¶„н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё
  • Podм—җ lables мқ„ лӢ¬м•„лҶ“мңјл©ҙ statefulset,service к°ҷмқҖ controllerм—җм„ң labelSelectorлҘј нҶөн•ҙ л§Өм№ҳлҗҳлҠ” Podмқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•Ё

.spec.affinity

  • PodлҘј мҠӨмјҖмӨ„л§Ғ н•  л•Ң м–ҙл–Ө worker-nodeм—җ л°°м№ҳн•  м§Җ мЎ°кұҙмқ„ м„Өм •н•ҳлҠ” мҳөм…ҳ
  • podAffinity м„Өм •мңјлЎң нҠ№м • Podл“Өмқ„ к°ҷмқҖ л…ёл“ңм—җ лӘЁм•„ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ л№„мҡ©мқ„ мӨ„мқј мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲкі 
  • podAntiAffinity м„Өм •мңјлЎң к°ҷмқҖ кё°лҠҘмқҳ Podл“Өмқ„ к°ҷмқҖ л…ёл“ңм—җ л°°м№ҳн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  м—¬лҹ¬ л…ёл“ңм—җ л¶„мӮ°л°°м№ҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • мң„ Podм„Өм •м—җм„ңлҠ” podAntiAffinity м„Өм •мңјлЎң Podл“Өмқ„ л¶„мӮ°л°°м№ҳн•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ”лҚ° podAffinityTerm[].labelSelector.matchLabels: мҳөм…ҳмңјлЎң н•ҙлӢ№ labelмқҙ лӢ¬лҰ° Podк°Җ мҶҚн•ң node м—җлҠ” ‘лҗҳлҸ„лЎқ’ л°°м№ҳн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл Өн•ңлӢӨ. (preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution)

.spec.containers[].args

  • Pod лӮҙ containerлҘј мғқм„ұн•  л•Ң entrypointлЎң л„ҳкІЁмӨ„ arguments м§Җм •
  • /opt/bitnami/redis/etc/redis.conf redis configure нҢҢмқјмқ„ ліөмӮ¬н•ҳкі 
  • redis cluster кө¬м„ұмқ„ мң„н•ң shellмқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ м„Өм •н•ҳкі  мһҲмқҢ
    • /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/entrypoint.sh
    • /opt/bitnami/scripts/redis-cluster/run.sh

.spec.containers[].env

  • containerм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳлҘј м„Өм •н•ҙм„ң л„ҳкІЁмӨҢ

.spec.containers[].image

  • мғқм„ұн•  container image м§Җм •

.spec.containers[].livenessProbe

  • Containerк°Җ лҸҷмһ‘ мӨ‘ мқём§Җ /scripts/ping_liveness_local.sh мҲҳн–үмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ нҷ•мқён•Ё
  • livenessProbe лҸҷмһ‘м—җ мӢӨнҢЁн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° worker nodeмқҳ kubeletмқҖ н•ҙлӢ№ containerлҘј мһ¬кё°лҸҷн•Ё

.spec.containers[].readinessProbe

  • Container к°Җ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мІҳлҰ¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мғҒнғңмқём§Җ /scripts/ping_readiness_local.sh мҲҳн–үмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ нҷ•мқён•Ё
  • readinessProbe лҸҷмһ‘м—җ мӢӨнҢЁн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° endpoint ControllerлҠ” н•ҙлӢ№ Podмқҳ IPлҘј лӘЁл“  endpointм—җм„ң м ңкұ°н•Ё

.spec.containers[].resources

  • .spec.containers[].resources.limit -> Podк°Җ мөңлҢҖн•ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м„ңлІ„ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ н•ңкі„м„ мқ„ м§Җм •, м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ Pod н•ҳлӮҳк°Җ л…ёл“ңмқҳ лӘЁл“  лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • .spec.containers[].resources.requests -> PodлҘј мғқм„ұн•  л•Ң м§Җм •н•ң л§ҢнҒјмқҳ мөңмҶҢн•ңмқҳ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј н• лӢ№ н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л…ёл“ңм—җ л°°м№ҳ, л§ҢмЎұн•ҳлҠ” л…ёл“ңк°Җ м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ Pod pending

.spec.conatiners.volumeMounts

  • .spec.volumes м—җм„ң мӨҖл№„н•ң volumeмқ„ container м—җ л§Өн•‘н•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •
  • мҳҲлҘјл“Өм–ҙ .spec.volumes м—җм„ң redis-data мқҙлҰ„мңјлЎң мғқм„ұн•ң PVC ліјлҘЁмқҖ containerмқҳ /bitnami/redis/data л””л үнҶ лҰ¬мҷҖ л§Өн•‘лҗЁ

.spec.volumes

  • ContainerлҠ” stateless н•ң нҠ№м„ұмқҙ мһҲмңјлӮҳ ліҙмЎҙн•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” лҚ°мқҙн„°к°Җ мһҲмқ„ кІҪмҡ° volumeмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳм—¬ л…ёл“ңмқҳ л””мҠӨнҒ¬мҷҖ containerмқҳ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј л§Өн•‘н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • PVC redis-data-kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-0лҘј нҶөн•ҙ hostPath typeмқҳ PV мҷҖ л§Өн•‘н•Ё, PodлҠ” мқҙ PVCлҘј нҶөн•ҙ мӢӨм ң ліјлҘЁ м—ӯн• мқ„ н•ҳлҠ” PVмҷҖ л§Өн•‘лҗЁ
  • к·ё мҷём—җ configmap volume кіј Podк°Җ restart лҗҳл©ҙ мҙҲкё°нҷ”лҗҳлҠ” emptyDir мқ„ м„ м–ён•Ё

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - Node
item.description:
node?

node к°ңл…җ

  • Kubernetes м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠёлҠ” м•„лһҳ м„ёк°Җм§ҖлЎң кө¬л¶„лҗЁ
    • master node
    • worker node
    • addon component (н•„мҲҳлҠ”м•„лӢҳ)

Master node

Master nodeлҠ” kubernetes cluster лҘј кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” nodeлЎң нҒ¬кІҢ м•„лһҳмқҳ м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠёлЎң мқҙлЈЁм–ҙм§җ

  • kube-apiserver : kubernetes лЎң мҳӨлҠ” лӘЁл“  мҡ”мІӯмқ„ apiserverк°Җ л°ӣм•„м„ң мқҙ мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мң нҡЁн•ңм§Җ кІҖмҰқн•Ё. kubernetes лӮҙ лӘЁл“  м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠёлҠ” kube-apiserverлҘј нҶөн•ҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң м •ліҙлҘј мЈјкі л°ӣмқҢ
  • kube-scheduler : Pod мғқм„ұ мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мҷ”мқ„ л•Ң affinity, anti-affinity, resource requests л“ұмқҳ Pod мғқм„ұмЎ°кұҙмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҳм—¬ мЎ°кұҙм—җ л¶Җн•©н•ҳлҠ” nodeлҘј м°ҫм•„ PodлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” м—ӯн• мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•Ё
  • kube-controller-manager : node , network routing, loadbalancer, volume мқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” м—ӯн• 
  • etcd : kubernetes мқҳ statusлҘј key value лЎң м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ” kubernetesмқҳ database м—ӯн• 

Worker node

Pod мӢӨн–ү л°Ҹ кҙҖлҰ¬ л“ұ kubernetesлӮҙ мҳӨлёҢм қнҠёл“Өмқҳ мӢӨн–ү нҷҳкІҪмқ„ м ңкіөн•ҳкі  кҙҖлҰ¬н•Ё

  • kubelet : kubernetes cluster лӮҙ лӘЁл“  nodeм—җм„ң мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” м—җмқҙм „нҠёлЎң Pod лӮҙ containerлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳкі  н—¬мҠӨмІҙнҒ¬н•ҳлҠ” м—ӯн• 
  • kube-proxy : л…ёл“ңм—җ л“Өм–ҙмҳӨлҠ” л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ нҠёлһҳн”Ҫмқ„ нҸ¬л“ң лӮҙмқҳ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳм—җкІҢ лқјмҡ°нҢ…н•ҳкі  л…ёл“ңмҷҖ л§ҲмҠӨн„°к°„мқҳ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ нҶөмӢ мқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” м—ӯн• 
  • Container runtime : containerлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮӨлҠ” м—ӯн• лЎң мЈјлЎң dockerлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё

worker node к°„ pod нҶөмӢ мқҖ м–ҙл–»кІҢ мқҙлЈЁм–ҙм§Ҳк№Ң?

  • host01 мқҳ Pod -> host02мқҳ PodмңјлЎң м ‘мҶҚн•  л•Ң host01мқҳ cbr0 (10.168.20.1) -> NAT -> eth0 (192.168.10.11) -> лқјмҡ°н„°/кІҢмқҙнҠёмӣЁмқҙлЎң лҸ„м°©
  • лқјмҡ°н„°/кІҢмқҙнҠёмӣЁмқҙм—җлҠ” 192.168.30.0/24 лЎңмқҳ мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мҳӨл©ҙ м–ҙлҠҗ нҳёмҠӨнҠёлЎң ліҙлӮҙм•јн•ҳлҠ”м§Җм—җ лҢҖн•ң к·ңм№ҷмқ„ к°Җм§Җкі  мһҲм–ҙм„ң host02лЎң м „лӢ¬н•Ё
  • мқҙмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кө¬мЎ°лҘј host к°„мқҳ network мң„м—җ лі„лҸ„мқҳ network к°Җ лҳҗ мЎҙмһ¬н•ңлӢӨ н•ҳм—¬ overlay networkлқјкі  н•Ё

  • nodeмқҳ labels мқҖ мЈјлЎң Pod мқҳ affinity , antiAffinity м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳм–ҙ Podмқҙ нҠ№м • nodeм—җ мғқм„ұлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ н•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗЁ

.status.conditions

  • node мқҳ нҳ„мһ¬ мғҒнғңлҘј нҷ•мқён•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ мЈјлЎң kubectl decribe node nodeлӘ…мңјлЎң нҷ•мқён•Ё
  • memoryлӮҳ disk к°Җ л¶ҖмЎұн•ңм§Җ л“ұмқҳ мғҒнғңк°Җ лӮҳмҳӨкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ Pod мқҙ мғқм„ұ м•Ҳлҗҳкұ°лӮҳ мқҙмғҒмқҙ мһҲмқ„ л•Ң нҷ•мқён•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” м •ліҙмһ„

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - кө¬м„ұмҡ”мҶҢ

node

item.title: Kubernetesм—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј лҸҢл Өліҙмһҗ - install
item.description:
лӘ©м Ғ

  • kubernentes м—җм„ң redis clusterлҘј мүҪкІҢ л°°нҸ¬н•ҙліҙмһҗ
  • Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) кё°лҠҘмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ redis clusterлҘј autoscaling н•ҙліҙмһҗ

мҷң мҝ лІ„л„ӨнӢ°мҠӨ ?

  • resource limit & request м„Өм •мңјлЎң Redis ContainerлҘј kubernetes Nodeм—җ нҡЁмңЁм Ғмқё л¶„мӮ° л°°м№ҳ к°ҖлҠҘ
  • мһҘм•  мӢңм—” мһҗлҸҷнҷ”лҗң н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨм—җ мқҳн•ҙ ліөкө¬лҗЁ (auto healing)
  • Memory л¶ҖмЎұ л“ұ, н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ° Scale up лҝҗл§Ң м•„лӢҲлқј Scale out к№Ңм§Җ к°ҖлҠҘ
  • лӘЁл“  мһ‘м—…мқ„ ‘м„ м–ём Ғ'мңјлЎң мһҗлҸҷнҷ”н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

Prerequisites

  • kubernetes 1.20 мқҙмғҒ
    • 1.20 мқҙмғҒл¶Җн„° HPA metricмңјлЎң memory м¶”к°ҖлҗЁ
  • helm 3.0.1 мқҙмғҒ
  • bitnami м—җм„ң м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” redis cluster helm chart
  • NHN Cloud kubernetes м„ңл№„мҠӨ
    • NHN Cloud м§Җмӣҗ kubernetes лІ„м „мқҖ v1.17 мңјлЎң HPA metric memory мӮ¬мҡ© л¶Ҳк°ҖлҠҘ
    • мқҙ нҸ¬мҠӨнҢ…м—җм„ңлҠ” м„Өм№ҳ л°Ҹ м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ мҶҢк°ңлҠ” NHN cloud, memory мӮ¬мҡ©м—җ л”°лҘё autoscaleмқҖ к°ңмқё PCнҷҳкІҪм—җм„ң лӢӨлЈЁкі  мһҲмқҢ

м„Өм№ҳ

kubernetes м„Өм№ҳ

  • NHN cloud Container м„ңл№„мҠӨ нғӯм—җм„ң kubernetes clusterлҘј к°„лӢЁнһҲ мғқм„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
  • worker node 3к°ң м§ңлҰ¬ kubernetes clusterлҘј мғқм„ұн•Ё

м„Өм№ҳн•ң kubernetesм—җ м ‘мҶҚн•ҙліҙмһҗ

### лӢӨмҡҙл°ӣмқҖ kubeconfig нҢҢмқјмқ„ нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳлЎң м„Өм •н•Ё
$ export KUBECONFIG=kimdubi-test_kubeconfig.yaml

### м„Өм№ҳн•ң kubernetes м ‘мҶҚ нҷ•мқё

$ kubectl get all
NAME                 TYPE        CLUSTER-IP   EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)   AGE
service/kubernetes   ClusterIP   10.254.0.1   <none>        443/TCP   46m

$ kubectl get nodes
NAME                                         STATUS   ROLES    AGE   VERSION
kimdubi-test-default-w-46niimovcith-node-0   Ready    <none>   43m   v1.17.6
kimdubi-test-default-w-46niimovcith-node-1   Ready    <none>   42m   v1.17.6
kimdubi-test-default-w-46niimovcith-node-2   Ready    <none>   42m   v1.17.6

storageClass мғқм„ұ

### мІҳмқҢ кө¬м„ұ мӢң storage classк°Җ м—ҶмқҢ

$ kubectl get sc
No resources found


$ cat storage_class.yaml

apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
  name: kimdubi-test
provisioner: kubernetes.io/cinder
parameters:
  type: General HDD
  availability: kr-pub-b

### Storage class мғқм„ұ

$ kubectl apply -f storage_class.yaml
storageclass.storage.k8s.io/kimdubi-test created

$ kubectl get sc
NAME           PROVISIONER            RECLAIMPOLICY   VOLUMEBINDINGMODE   ALLOWVOLUMEEXPANSION   AGE
kimdubi-test   kubernetes.io/cinder   Delete          Immediate           false                  2s
  • Pod м—җ PVC лҘј м—°кІ°н•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” storageClass к°Җ мһҲм–ҙм•јн•Ё
  • мІҳмқҢ м„ёнҢ… нӣ„м—” storageClass к°Җ м—Ҷкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ provisioner: kubernetes.io/cinder лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” Storage classлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҙмӨҖлӢӨ
  • мғқм„ұн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ м•„лһҳл¶Җн„° м§„н–үн•  redis pod мғқм„ұмқҙ PVC мғқм„ұ мӢӨнҢЁлЎң pending лҗЁ
  • м•„лһҳ л§ҒнҒ¬м—җм„ң NHN cloudм—җм„ң м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” Storage typeкіј мғқм„ұ мЎ°кұҙмқ„ нҷ•мқё
    • https://docs.toast.com/ko/Container/Kubernetes/ko/user-guide/#_32

helm chart л°ӣм•„мҳӨкё°

$ helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami
$ helm fetch bitnami/redis-cluster

helm chart мӮҙнҺҙліҙмһҗ

$ tree redis-cluster
redis-cluster
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Chart.lock
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Chart.yaml
в”ңв”Җв”Җ README.md
в”ңв”Җв”Җ charts
в”ӮВ В  в””в”Җв”Җ common

в”ӮВ В  в””в”Җв”Җ redis-topology.png

в”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ prometheusrule.yaml
в”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ psp.yaml

в”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ redis-svc.yaml

в”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ secret.yaml
в”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ svc-cluster-external-access.yaml
в”ӮВ В  в””в”Җв”Җ update-cluster.yaml
в””в”Җв”Җ values.yaml
  • object, controllerм—җ кіөнҶөмңјлЎң м Ғмҡ©лҗ  м„Өм •мқҖ .charts.common.templates, .chrats.common.values.yaml м—җ м •мқҳлҗЁ
  • redis clusterлҘј кө¬м„ұн•ҳлҠ” templateкіј м„Өм •мқҖ .templates, .values.yamlм—җ м •мқҳлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмқҢ
  • customizingмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң л¶Җл¶„мқҖ .values.yamlм—җм„ң к°’мқ„ мҲҳм •н•ҳм—¬ helmмқ„ мһ¬л°°нҸ¬н•ҳл©ҙ лҗЁ

helm chart values мҲҳм •

к°„лӢЁнһҲ redis Podмқҳ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мӮ¬мҡ©лҘ мқ„ м ңн•ңн•ҳлҠ” л¶Җл¶„кіј PV, redis.conf л§Ң мҲҳм •н•ҳкІ мқҢ

  • resource requests / limits мҲҳм •
$ vi helmмң„м№ҳ/values.yaml 

177   resources:
178     requests:
179       memory: 50Mi
180       cpu: 50m
181     limits:
182       memory: 100Mi
183       cpu: 100m


383   resources:
384     ## We usually recommend not to specify default resources and to leave this as a conscious
385     ## choice for the user. This also increases chances charts run on environments with little
386     ## resources, such as Minikube. If you do want to specify resources, uncomment the following
387     ## lines, adjust them as necessary, and remove the curly braces after 'resources:'.
388     ##
389     limits: 
390       cpu: 100m
391       memory: 100Mi
392     ##
393     requests: 
394       cpu: 50m
395       memory: 50Mi
396     ##
  • redis physical volume size мҲҳм •
$ vi helmмң„м№ҳ/values.yaml 

705   storageClass: kimdubi-test
706   accessModes:
707     - ReadWriteOnce
708   size: 2Gi

=> storageClass м§Җм • л°Ҹ size: 8Gi -> 2Gi мҲҳм •

  • configmap мҲҳм • (redis.conf)
$ vi helmмң„м№ҳ/templates/configmap.yaml

maxmemory 80M
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru

helm install

$ helm install kimdubi-test ./redis-cluster

$ helm install kimdubi-test ./redis-cluster
WARNING: Kubernetes configuration file is group-readable. This is insecure. Location: /Users/mac/Downloads/kimdubi-test_kubeconfig.yaml
WARNING: Kubernetes configuration file is world-readable. This is insecure. Location: /Users/mac/Downloads/kimdubi-test_kubeconfig.yaml

NAME: kimdubi-test
LAST DEPLOYED: Sun Feb 21 16:33:55 2021
NAMESPACE: default
STATUS: deployed
REVISION: 1
TEST SUITE: None
NOTES:
** Please be patient while the chart is being deployed **


To get your password run:
    export REDIS_PASSWORD=$(kubectl get secret --namespace default kimdubi-test-redis-cluster -o jsonpath="{.data.redis-password}" | base64 --decode)

You have deployed a Redis(TM) Cluster accessible only from within you Kubernetes Cluster.INFO: The Job to create the cluster will be created.To connect to your Redis(TM) cluster:

1. Run a Redis(TM) pod that you can use as a client:
kubectl run --namespace default kimdubi-test-redis-cluster-client --rm --tty -i --restart='Never' \
 --env REDIS_PASSWORD=$REDIS_PASSWORD \
--image docker.io/bitnami/redis-cluster:6.0.10-debian-10-r5 -- bash

2. Connect using the Redis(TM) CLI:

redis-cli -c -h kimdubi-test-redis-cluster -a $REDIS_PASSWORD

dori:helm mac$ kubectl get pvc
NAME                                      STATUS   VOLUME                                     CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   AGE

item.title: kubernetes Volume
item.description:
нҳјмһҗ мҝ лІ„л„ӨнӢ°мҠӨ м •лҰ¬н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң кёҖ, мҳӨлҠҳмқҖ volume нҺё

м—¬нғң мғқм„ұн–ҲлҚҳ Podл“ӨмқҖ stateless containerлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі  мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. к·ёлһҳм„ң PodлӮҳ Nodeк°Җ мһ¬кё°лҸҷлҗҳл©ҙ к·ё лҚ°мқҙн„°к°Җ мӮ¬лқјм§ҖлҠ” лӢЁм җмқҙ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ.
л§Ңм•Ҫ м ңкіөн•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” м„ңл№„мҠӨм—җм„ң мқҙлҹ° кІҪмҡ°м—җлҸ„ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј кі„мҶҚ ліҙмЎҙн•ҙм•јн•ңлӢӨл©ҙ kubernetesм—җм„ңлҠ” Volumeмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•јн•ңлӢӨ.

volume

emptyDir

Podк°Җ мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” hostмқҳ diskлҘј Contatinerмқҳ volumeмңјлЎң н• лӢ№н•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘ,
Containerк°Җ мһ¬кё°лҸҷ лҗҳм–ҙлҸ„ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҠ” ліҙмЎҙлҗҳм§Җл§Ң Podк°Җ мў…лЈҢлҗҳл©ҙ emptyDirм—җ н• лӢ№н–ҲлҚҳ volume лӮҙ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҸ„ мӮ¬лқјм§„лӢӨ.
мқҙ м җмқҙ м•һм„ң мӮҙнҺҙлҙӨлҚҳ kubectl drain node мҲҳн–ү мӢң emptyDir мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” Podмқҙ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ° м—җлҹ¬к°Җ л°ңмғқн•ҳлҠ” мқҙмң мқёл“Ҝ

apiVersion: v1 
kind: Pod 
metadata: 
  name: emptydir-test 
  labels:
    app: emptydir-test 
spec:
  containers:
  - name: nginx
    image: nginx 
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /emptydir 
      name: emptydir-volume 
    volumes:
    - name: emptydir-volume 
      emptyDir: {}

=> .spec.contatiners.volumes[] м—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н–җл ӨлҠ” ліјлҘЁмқ„ лЁјм Җ мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.
emptydir-volumeмқҙлқјлҠ” мқҙлҰ„мқҳ emptyDirмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  volumeMounts м—җм„ң мқҙ volumeмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкІ лӢӨкі  м§Җм • нӣ„
( .spec.containers.volumes[].name => .spec.containers.volumeMounts[].name мңјлЎң л§Өн•‘ )
.mountPath н•„л“ң к°’мңјлЎң containerмқҳ /emptydir л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лЎң mount

hostPath

Podмқҙ мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” hostмқҳ нҢҢмқјмқҙлӮҳ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј Podм—җ mountн•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘ
emptyDirкіјлҠ” лӢ¬лҰ¬ Podмқҙ мһ¬кё°лҸҷлҗҳм–ҙлҸ„ hostм—җ лҚ°мқҙн„°к°Җ лӮЁмқҢ

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: hostpath-test
  labels:
    app: hostpath-test
spec:
  containers:
  - name: nginx
    image: nginx
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /hostpath-volume
      name: hostpath-volume
  volumes:
  - name: hostpath-volume
    hostPath:
      path: /Users/nhn/Documents/kubernetes/volume
      type: Directory

PersistentVolume & PersistentVolumeClaim

м•һм„ң лҙӨлҚҳ volumeмқҖ volumeмқ„ Podм—җ м§Ғм ‘ н• лӢ№н•ҳлҠ” л°©мӢқмқҙлӢӨ.
к·ёл Үкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ л§Ңм•Ҫ Podк°Җ мӮ¬лқјм§Җл©ҙ м§Ғм ‘ н• лӢ№лҗң volumeлҸ„ мӮ¬лқјм§Җкі  volumeм—җ ліҖкІҪмӮ¬н•ӯмқҙ мғқкё°л©ҙ (ex. voulme type)
Podмқҳ volumeмқ„ мқјмқјмқҙ л°”кҝ”мӨҳм•ј н•ҳлҠ” л¶ҲнҺёмӮ¬н•ӯмқҙ мһҲлӢӨ.

мқҙ кө¬мЎ°лҘј Pod -> PVC -> PV лЎң ліҖкІҪн•ҳкІҢ лҗҳл©ҙ PodлҠ” PVCлҘј кұ°міҗм„ң volumeмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкІҢ лҗҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ м–ҙл–Ө мҠӨнҶ лҰ¬м§ҖлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ мӢ кІҪ м“°м§Җ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ лҗҳкі 
PVC м—җм„ң PVл§Ң мғҲлЎң ліҖкІҪн•ҙмЈјл©ҙ лҗҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мғҒнҷ©м—җ л§һкІҢ мң м—°н•ң мӮ¬мҡ©мқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ.

PV ( PersistentVolume )

к°ҖмғҒмқҳ volume к°қмІҙлЎң kubernetes clusterм—җм„ң PodмҷҖлҠ” лі„к°ң лҗң мһҗмӣҗмңјлЎңм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬н•ңлӢӨ.
лі„лҸ„мқҳ мғқлӘ…мЈјкё°к°Җ мһҲмңјл©° PVCлҘј нҶөн•ҙ PV н• лӢ№ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ л°ӣмңјл©ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ мҡ©лҹү, мқҪкё°/м“°кё° лӘЁл“ң л“ұм—җ л§һкІҢ PVлҘј provisiong н•ңлӢӨ.


мң„лҠ” static provisiongмқҳ л°©мӢқмқ„ лӮҳнғҖлӮҙлҠ”лҚ° PVмҷҖ PVCлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ мғқлӘ… мЈјкё°лҘј к°–лҠ”лӢӨ.

  • provisioing : PVлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” лӢЁкі„лЎң лҜёлҰ¬ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙ лҶ“лҠ” static, PVCлЎң л¶Җн„° мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мһҲмқ„ л•Ңл§ҲлӢӨ мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” dynamic л°©мӢқмқҙ мһҲлӢӨ.

  • binding : ProvisioningмңјлЎң мғқм„ұн•ң PVлҘј PVCмҷҖ м—°кІ°н•ҳлҠ” лӢЁкі„, PVCм—җм„ң мҡ”мІӯн•ң мҠӨнҺҷмқҳ PVлҘј л§Өн•‘н•ңлӢӨ. PVмҷҖ PVCлҠ” 1:1 кҙҖкі„

  • using: PVCлҠ” Podм—җ м—°кІ°лҗҳкі , PodлҠ” PVCлҘј volume ,мҰү PVCлЎң мқёмӢқн•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” лӢЁкі„

  • reclaiming: мӮ¬мҡ©мқҙ лҒқлӮң PVCлҠ” мӮӯм ңн•ҳкі  PVлҘј мҙҲкё°нҷ” н•ҳлҠ” кіјм •

  • pv_test.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume 
metadata: 
  name: pv-test 
  labels:
    storage: prod
spec:
  capacity:
    storage: 1Gi
  volumeMode: Filesystem
  accessModes: 
  - ReadWriteOnce  
  storageClassName: test
  persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Delete
  hostPath:
    path: /Users/nhn/Documents/kubernetes/volume/test/pv-test

=> volume plugin=hostPath л°©мӢқмңјлЎң 1GB м§ңлҰ¬ PV мғқм„ұ

PVC ( PersistentVolumeClaim )

Podк°Җ мһҗмӢ мқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” мҠӨнҶ лҰ¬м§ҖлҘј мӢ кІҪм“ё н•„мҡ” м—Ҷмқҙ PVCлҘј нҶөн•ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ мҠӨнҺҷмқҳ PVлҘј PVCм—җ мҡ”мІӯн•ҳл©ҙ PVCк°Җ к·ё мҠӨнҺҷм—җ л§һлҠ” PVлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  мһҗмӢ кіј л§Өн•‘мӢңнӮҙ.
PodлҠ” кІ°көӯ PVCлҘј VolumeмңјлЎң мқёмӢқн•ҳм—¬ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкІҢ лҗЁ

  • pvc_test.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: pvc-test
spec:
  accessModes:
  - ReadWriteOnce
  volumeMode: Filesystem
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 1Gi
  storageClassName: test
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      storage: prod

=> .spec.resources.requests н•„л“ңлҘј нҶөн•ҙ н•„мҡ”лЎң н•ҳлҠ” мһҗмӣҗмқ„ мҡ”мІӯн•ңлӢӨ.
.spec.selector лҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ labelsлЎң PVмҷҖ л§Өн•‘н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

$ kubectl get pv,pvc
NAME                       CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   RECLAIM POLICY   STATUS   CLAIM              STORAGECLASS   REASON   AGE
persistentvolume/pv-test   1Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/pvc-test   test                    6m47s

NAME                             STATUS   VOLUME    CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   AGE
persistentvolumeclaim/pvc-test   Bound    pv-test   1Gi        RWO            test           7s

=> pvc-test PVCк°Җ pv-test PVмҷҖ м—°кІ°лҗң кІғмқ„ нҷ•мқё

  • л§Өн•‘лҗҳлҠ” PVк°Җ м—Ҷмқ„ л•Ң
$ kubectl get pv,pvc
NAME                       CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   RECLAIM POLICY   STATUS      CLAIM   STORAGECLASS   REASON   AGE
persistentvolume/pv-test   1Gi        RWO            Delete           Available           test                    74s

NAME                             STATUS    VOLUME   CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   AGE
persistentvolumeclaim/pvc-test   Pending                                      manual         63s

=> PVC м—җм„ң мҡ”мІӯн•ң storageclassлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” PVк°Җ м—Ҷм–ҙм„ң PVCк°Җ PVлҘј л§Өн•‘н•ҳм§Җ лӘ»н•ҳкі  pending мғҒнғңмһ„

  • л§Өн•‘лҗҳлҠ” PVлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  лӢӨмӢң мЎ°нҡҢн•ҙліҙмһҗ
$ kubectl get pv,pvc
NAME                       CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   RECLAIM POLICY   STATUS   CLAIM              STORAGECLASS   REASON   AGE
persistentvolume/pv-test   1Gi        RWO            Delete           Bound    default/pvc-test   manual                  2m53s

NAME                             STATUS   VOLUME    CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   AGE
persistentvolumeclaim/pvc-test   Bound    pv-test   1Gi        RWO            manual         2m42s

PVCлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” PodлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҙліҙмһҗ

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata: 
  name: nginx-pvc-test
  labels:
    app: nginx-pvc-test
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      name: nginx 
      labels:
        app: nginx 
    spec:
      containers: 
      - name:  nginx
        image: nginx
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        volumeMounts:
        - name: pod-pvc-test
          mountPath: /pv-test
      volumes:
      - name: pod-pvc-test
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: pvc-test

=> .spec.template.spec.volumes[].name мңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  volumeмқ„ м„ м–ён•ҳлҠ”лҚ°
.spec.template.spec.volumes[].persistentVolumeClaim.cclaimNameмңјлЎң мқҙм „м—җ мғқм„ұн•ҙлҶ“мқҖ pvc-test PVCлҘј м„Өм •н•ңлӢӨ.
.spec.template.specc.containers.volumeMounts[].nameм—җм„ң pvc-test volumeмқ„ conatinerмқҳ /pv-testм—җ mount н•ңлӢӨкі  м„Өм •н•ңлӢӨ.
к·ёлҰ¬кі  мқҙ pvc-test PVCлҠ” pv-test мҷҖ л§Өн•‘лҗҳлҠ”лҚ° pv-test лҠ” мқҙм „м—җ hostPathлЎң hostмқҳ /Users/nhn/Documents/kubernetes/volume/test/pv-test л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ л§ҲмҡҙнҠёлҗЁ

$ kubectl describe pod/nginx-pvc-test-5d55669b9-vm8ml

Volumes:
  pod-pvc-test:
    Type:       PersistentVolumeClaim (a reference to a PersistentVolumeClaim in the same namespace)
    ClaimName:  pvc-test

$ kubectl describe persistentvolumeclaim/pvc-test

Volume:        pv-test
Mounted By:    nginx-pvc-test-5d55669b9-nkq68
               nginx-pvc-test-5d55669b9-vm8ml

$ kubectl describe persistentvolume/pv-test

Source:
    Type:          HostPath (bare host directory volume)
    Path:          /Users/nhn/Documents/kubernetes/volume/test/pv-test

item.title: kubernetes Pod Scheduling - cordon & drain
item.description:
нҳјмһҗ мҝ лІ„л„ӨнӢ°мҠӨ м •лҰ¬лҘј мң„н•ң кёҖ мҳӨлҠҳмқҖ cordon, drain нҺё

нҠ№м • nodeмқҳ м җкІҖ, м •мұ… ліҖкІҪ л“ұмңјлЎң нҠ№м • л…ёл“ңм—җ мһҲлҠ” podл“Өмқ„ лӢӨлҘё л…ёл“ңлЎң мҳ®кё°кұ°лӮҳ
мһ‘м—…мӢңк°„ лҸҷм•Ҳ нҠ№м • nodeм—җлҠ” Pod scheduling мқ„ л§үм•„лҶ“мқ„ н•„мҡ”к°Җ мһҲмқ„ л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘмқҙ cordonкіј drainмқҙлӢӨ.

cordon

cordon мқҖ м§Җм •н•ң nodeм—җ pod scheduling лҗҳлҠ” кІғмқ„ л§үлҠ” кё°лҠҘмһ„

  • cordon м„Өм •
$ kubectl get deploy,pod
NAME                                READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
deployment.apps/redis-deployment2   2/2     2            2           22h

NAME                                     READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-lq5pc   1/1     Running   0          22h
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-sq6vb   1/1     Running   0          22h


$ kubectl cordon minikube
node/minikube cordoned

$ kubectl get node
NAME       STATUS                     ROLES    AGE     VERSION
minikube   Ready,SchedulingDisabled   master   6d18h   v1.17.0

=> minikube nodeм—җ cordon м„Өм •н•ҳмһҗ SchedulingDisabled мғҒнғңк°Җ лҗЁ

  • scale н•ҙліҙмһҗ
$ kubectl scale deployment.apps/redis-deployment2 --replicas=4
deployment.apps/redis-deployment2 scaled

$ kubectl get deploy,pod
NAME                                READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
deployment.apps/redis-deployment2   2/4     4            2           22h

NAME                                     READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-h6vsl   0/1     Pending   0          6s
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-lb68q   0/1     Pending   0          6s
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-lq5pc   1/1     Running   0          22h
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-sq6vb   1/1     Running   0          22h

=> кё°мЎҙм—җ л– мһҲлҚҳ podлҠ” мғҒкҙҖм—Ҷм§Җл§Ң мғҲлЎң м¶”к°ҖлЎң лқ„мҡҙ 2лҢҖмқҳ podмқҖ pending мғҒнғңмһ„, nodeк°Җ лӢЁ н•ҳлӮҳмқёлҚ° к·ёкұё cordonн•ҙлІ„л ёмңјлӢҲ..

  • cordon н•ҙм ңн•ҳл©ҙ?
$ kubectl uncordon minikube
node/minikube uncordoned

$ kubectl get deploy,pod
NAME                                READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
deployment.apps/redis-deployment2   2/4     4            2           22h
deployment.apps/testnet             1/1     1            1           5d18h

NAME                                     READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-h6vsl   0/1     ContainerCreating   0          97s
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-lb68q   0/1     ContainerCreating   0          97s
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-lq5pc   1/1     Running             0          22h
pod/redis-deployment2-6bcb64f4d4-sq6vb   1/1     Running             0          22h

=> uncordon н•ҳл©ҙ pendingмғҒнғңмҳҖлҚҳ podмқҙ лӢӨмӢң мғқм„ұлҗЁ

drain

drain кё°лҠҘмқҖ нҠ№м • nodeмқҳ podл“Өмқ„ лӢӨлҘё nodeлЎң мқҙлҸҷмӢңнӮӨлҠ” кё°лҠҘмңјлЎң drain мҲҳн–ү мӢң
н•ҙлӢ№ Nodeм—җ pod schedulingмқ„ л§үкі , мӢӨн–үмӨ‘мқҙлҚҳ podл“Өмқ„ мӮӯм ңн•ңлӢӨ. мқҙ л•Ң podм—җм„ң мҲҳн–үлҗҳлҚҳ мһ‘м—…л“Өмқҙ м •лҰ¬лҗ  л•Ң к№Ңм§Җ кё°лӢӨлҰ° нӣ„ мӮӯм ңн•ңлӢӨ. (graceful)

  • drain м•ҲлҗҳлҠ” м„ёк°Җм§Җ кІҪмҡ°
* нҢҢл“ңк°Җ emptyDirмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ local dataлҘј м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°

emptyDirлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ local dataлҘј м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ” нҢҢл“ңк°Җ н•ҙлӢ№ мӣҢм»Ө л…ёл“ңм—җ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°, мқҙ нҢҢл“ңлҘј мӮӯм ң мӢң н•ҙлӢ№ лҚ°мқҙн„° лҳҗн•ң мӮӯм ңлҗҳлҜҖлЎң мҲҳн–үлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢл“ңк°Җ м ңкұ°лҗҳм–ҙлҸ„ л¬ём ңк°Җ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ°м—җлҠ” --delete-local-data н”Ңлһҳк·ёлҘј drain лӘ…л №м–ҙм—җ м¶”к°Җн•ҳм—¬ мҲҳн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

* н•ҙлӢ№ мӣҢм»Ө л…ёл“ңм—җ лҚ°лӘ¬м…Ӣ(daemonset)мқҙ кө¬лҸҷлҗҳкі  мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°

лҚ°лӘ¬м…Ӣм—җ мҶҚн•ң нҢҢл“ңк°Җ н•ҙлӢ№ мӣҢм»Ө л…ёл“ңм—җ кө¬лҸҷлҗҳкі  мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°, kubectl drain лӘ…л №мқҙ мҲҳн–үлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. лҚ°лӘ¬м…Ӣ м»ЁнҠёлЎӨлҹ¬лҠ” л…ёл“ңк°Җ unschedulable мғҒнғңм—җ мһҲлҚ”лқјлҸ„ мқҙлҘј л¬ҙмӢңн•ҳкі  н•ҙлӢ№ л…ёл“ңм—җ нҢҢл“ңлҘј мҠӨмјҖмӨ„н•ҳм—¬ л°°м№ҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. лҚ°лӘ¬м…Ӣм—җ мҶҚн•ң нҢҢл“ңк°Җ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°м—җлҠ”, --ignore-daemonsets н”Ңлһҳк·ёлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳм—¬ н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢл“ңлҘј м¶•м¶ң лҢҖмғҒм—җм„ң м ңмҷён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

* Kubernetesмқҳ м»ЁнҠёлЎӨлҹ¬м—җм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” нҢҢл“ңк°Җ кө¬лҸҷлҗҳкі  мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°

Kubernetesм—җм„ңлҠ” Deployment, Statefulset, DaemonSet, ReplicaSet, Jobкіј к°ҷмқҖ м»ЁнҠёлЎӨлҹ¬к°Җ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” нҢҢл“ңк°Җ н•ҙлӢ№ мӣҢм»Ө л…ёл“ң мғҒм—җ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°, kubectl drain лӘ…л №м–ҙлҠ” мқҙлҘј ліҙнҳён•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ң лҸҷмһ‘н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. --force н”Ңлһҳк·ёлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳм—¬ kubectl drain лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°, мқҙлҹ¬н•ң нҢҢл“ңлҠ” нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°м—җм„ң м ңкұ°лҗҳл©° мһ¬мҠӨмјҖмӨ„л§Ғлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
  • drain н•ҙліҙмһҗ
$ kubectl drain minikube
node/minikube already cordoned
error: unable to drain node "minikube", aborting command...

There are pending nodes to be drained:
 minikube
cannot delete DaemonSet-managed Pods (use --ignore-daemonsets to ignore): kube-system/kube-proxy-vxf7k
cannot delete Pods not managed by ReplicationController, ReplicaSet, Job, DaemonSet or StatefulSet (use --force to override): kube-system/storage-provisioner
cannot delete Pods with local storage (use --delete-local-data to override): kubernetes-dashboard/dashboard-metrics-scraper-7b64584c5c-mn29t, kubernetes-dashboard/kubernetes-dashboard-79d9cd965-rsbzn

=> лӯ”к°Җ demonset, нҳ№мқҖ emptyDirмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” Pod л“Өмқҙ мһҲлӢӨл©° drainмқҙ м•ҲлҗңлӢӨлҠ” м—җлҹ¬к°Җ л–ҙлӢӨ. мІҳмқҢліҙлҠ” Podл“ӨмқёлҚ° к·ё лӮҙк°Җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” namespaceмқҳ Podл“Өмқҙ м•„лӢҲкё° л•Ңл¬ёмқҙлӢӨ.

$ kubectl get deploy,pod --all-namespaces
